description: Drafts a step plan (LLM) and stores it in a deterministic kv list; status is mechanical truth, not model memory. Functions: plan/status/done.
author: @flowork-os

exposes_rpc.name: plan
exposes_rpc.description: Draft a step plan for a goal and store it.

exposes_rpc.name: status
exposes_rpc.description: Read the stored plan + step statuses (ground truth).
